title: BEM-537 task1 transport consumer
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem537')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
state = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM537_LIVE_TRANSPORT_ORCHESTRATION_TEST.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

roadmap.write_text('# BEM-537 | Live Transport Orchestration Test Roadmap\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:36 (UTC+3)\n\n## Цель\nПроверить не только запись в `governance/transport/results.jsonl`, но и автоматическое чтение/реакцию transport-consumer logic внутри репозиторного контура.\n\n## Граница теста\nРеального отдельного workflow_dispatch для role-orchestrator/provider-adapter из GPT-канала сейчас нет. Поэтому BEM-537 проверяет live-like consumer внутри разрешённого Python executor v3: consumer читает append-only transport, выбирает next_role, пишет decision/state и result.\n\n## Roadmap из 3 задач\n1. Task 1 — создать transport consumer contract и synthetic input records.\n2. Task 2 — выполнить consumer decision pass: прочитать transport, выбрать next_role/action, обновить state.\n3. Task 3 — adapter reaction + final audit: проверить, что decision породил execution/final_result и закрыть roadmap.\n\n## PASS\n- consumer читает `results.jsonl`;\n- consumer пишет decision artifact;\n- state меняется на основании прочитанной записи;\n- final transport result appended;\n- blocker=null.\n')

contract = Path('governance/protocols/TRANSPORT_CONSUMER_CONTRACT.md')
contract.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
contract.write_text('# BEM-537 | Transport Consumer Contract\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:36 (UTC+3)\n\n## Purpose\nDefines how internal contour consumer reads `governance/transport/results.jsonl` and converts records into next role decisions.\n\n## Inputs\nAppend-only JSONL records: intake, analysis, audit, execution, final_result, provider_adapter_result, telegram_hourly_report_synthetic.\n\n## Decision rules\n- curator_intake/intake -> next_role from record or analyst by default.\n- analysis completed -> auditor.\n- audit PASS_TO_EXECUTOR -> executor.\n- execution completed -> auditor final.\n- final_result completed -> curator closure.\n- failed/cancelled/timeout -> curator blocker/failover.\n\n## Outputs\n- consumer_decision record in transport.\n- role_cycle_state.json update.\n- decision artifact under governance/internal_contour/tests.\n')

cycle = 'bem537-transport-consumer-test'
input_record = {
  'record_type':'intake',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'gpt',
  'from_role':'curator',
  'to_role':'consumer',
  'status':'completed',
  'next_role':'analyst',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem537/input_request.json',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 13:36 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'input_request.json').write_text(json.dumps(input_record, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(input_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

state['cycle_id'] = cycle
state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 13:36 (UTC+3)'
state['curator_status'] = 'ASSIGNED'
state['active_role'] = 'consumer'
state['next_role'] = 'analyst'
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-537.1','title':'Transport consumer input and contract','status':'completed'}
state['blocker'] = None
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list):
    hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 13:36 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-537 Task 1 input record appended','status':'PASS'})
state['history'] = hist
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem537_task1_transport_consumer_contract.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-537 Task 1 | Transport Consumer Contract + Input | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:36 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Roadmap created.\n- Transport consumer contract created.\n- Synthetic input record appended to results.jsonl.\n- role_cycle_state updated.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof = proofs/'bem537_task1_transport_consumer_contract.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-537 Task 1 PASS: transport consumer contract and input record created. blocker=null\n')
changed_files.extend([str(roadmap), str(contract), str(base/'input_request.json'), str(transport), str(state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-537 Task 1 created transport consumer contract and input record')
"""
